name: Dhaka Commercial Center
description: The economic heartbeat of Bangladesh, driving the apparel export sector, telecom headquarters, and international commerce hubs.

name: Kuala Lumpur Financial District
description: Global financial center containing key multinational institutions, advanced fintech ventures, and premium real estate assets.

name: Port of Chittagong
description: Handling over 90% of Bangladesh's international maritime trade, Chittagong acts as the primary shipping connector to Port Klang.

name: Penang High-Tech Hub
description: Commonly known as the 'Silicon Valley of the East', Penang leads Malaysia's advanced electronics, wafer fabrication, and packaging sectors.
